why_they_bought: A small regional carrier that bought the minimum viable package (Live Map only) and never expanded usage past it.
legacy_system_note: No prior dispatch/telematics system is named in canon for this account -- the bible does not attribute a legacy-migration story to Quarrystone (unlike Pinehill/Meridian/Aspenridge/Trailhead), consistent with it being the smallest, lowest-touch account in the arc set. Recorded as null rather than invented.
success_criteria: Basic Live Map coverage across its 12 licensed assets
